body:
I keep crying.

There’s a lot of health and life stuff going on with my fiancée’s dad. But over the past few months, he’s been trying to connect with me more. He was very unsure about us being together at first and at times has expressed some homophobic and transphobic things privately to my partner (but has always been polite to me) as he’s come to terms with their sexuality and the fact she is marrying a trans woman. But I’ve watched his growth and more and more lately he’s talked about being family and we’ve been helping him a lot with everything going on with him right now.

Other than my kids, I have two family members that I talk with, my dad and my aunt. My aunt tries. My dad will sometimes use the correct pronouns, but isn’t happy about it. My mom hasn’t seen me since I broke her heart the way I “modified” myself. (this was pre-suregery.) But I knew long before I came out, acceptance from from my parents was never coming.

As my partner and I were cuddling earlier, they told me when they were spending time at his place today, he mentioned “I have *two* such smart daughters.&rdq
reblog_comment:
I keep crying.

There’s a lot of health and life stuff going on with my fiancée’s dad. But over the past few months, he’s been trying to connect with me more. He was very unsure about us being together at first and at times has expressed some homophobic and transphobic things privately to my partner (but has always been polite to me) as he’s come to terms with their sexuality and the fact she is marrying a trans woman. But I’ve watched his growth and more and more lately he’s talked about being family and we’ve been helping him a lot with everything going on with him right now.

Other than my kids, I have two family members that I talk with, my dad and my aunt. My aunt tries. My dad will sometimes use the correct pronouns, but isn’t happy about it. My mom hasn’t seen me since I broke her heart the way I “modified” myself. (this was pre-suregery.) But I knew long before I came out, acceptance from from my parents was never coming.

As my partner and I were cuddling earlier, they told me when they were spending time at his place today, he mentioned “I have *two* such smart daughters.”

I…I’m not ok. The dad I grew up with is the same age as him…

I have a dad and he calls me his daughter. 😭😭😭
